overview: EduFees is a fee management web application for educational institutions. It enables admins to manage fee structures, student rosters, payment recording, and collections reporting — all secured with Internet Identity authentication.
features: Internet Identity login with polished authentication page
Fee structure builder with late penalty configuration
Student roster management with bulk CSV import and row-level error reporting
Manual payment recording with duplicate receipt detection
Aging report with drill-down into overdue payments
Empty state quickstart actions across all pages
